text:
Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 - Vault Edition Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/call-of-duty-modern-warfare-4/

The Modern Warfare 4 Vault Edition comes fully loaded, featuring:

Hostile Alliance Operator Pack (4 Operator Skins)
Special Forces Operator Pack (4 Operator Skins)
Signature Weapon Collection (5 Weapon Blueprints)
One Season of BlackCell
DMZ Deployment Bonus

Pre-Order Now.

#ps5 #ps5games #cod #modernwarfare #callofduty

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
The Future is Decided in Fortnite: Shattered | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/fortnite/

Two teams. One winner! The Island's fate hangs in the balance as the Fortnite: Shattered Season 2 End Event kicks off on June 5. Doors open at 6:20 PM ET and the event begins at 7 PM ET.

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #fortnite
